findings.message:
Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate.

In @src/loop/worker-packet.ts around lines 418 - 430, Update expandScopeWithGraphOutput to return the existing scope immediately when scope is empty, before checking graph-build commands or adding .polaris/graph/NOTICES. Preserve the current expansion behavior only for non-empty scopes that do not already explicitly cover the graph path.
